summary: Iteration 5 testing completed successfully. All new features verified: 1) Interview voice/camera UI elements present (mic button, voice toggle, camera toggle, live transcript banner, proctoring indicator), 2) Custom question visualizer in 3D View page working with POST /api/visualize/question endpoint returning data_structure, steps, complexity. Note: Voice features (Web Speech API) and camera (getUserMedia) require browser permissions - UI elements tested, actual functionality requires user permission grant.
critical_code_review_comments: Voice features (mic auto-on after AI speaks, speech-to-text, auto-send) rely on Web Speech API which requires browser permissions - cannot be fully automated tested
Camera video display uses getUserMedia which also requires browser permissions - UI element present but actual video stream requires permission grant
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - using existing test user
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 5 features verified: 1) Interview setup page has role input, JD input, 4 round indicators (R1-R4), Start Interview button. 2) Interview screen has chat area, AI message, mic button, voice toggle, camera toggle, proctoring indicator, round indicators R1-R4, message input, send button, Next Round button, Show IDE button, End Interview button. 3) 3D Visualizer has custom question input textarea with Visualize button - POST /api/visualize/question returns data_structure, title, data array, steps with active_indices, explanation, complexity. 4) SQL Lab shows 580 problems with SQL Mentor chatbot. 5) Problem Workspace has Description/Tests/Pattern/Debugger tabs all working.

interview_setup_page.details: Interview setup page (/interview) renders with role input, JD input, 4 round indicators (R1 Intro & DSA, R2 Projects & Core, R3 Managerial & SD, R4 HR Round), Start Interview button. BrainCircuit icon used for Alex Chen avatar.

interview_screen_elements.details: Interview screen (/interview/:id) has: chat area with AI message, mic button (data-testid='mic-btn'), voice toggle (data-testid='toggle-voice-btn'), camera toggle (data-testid='toggle-camera-btn'), proctoring indicator (data-testid='proctoring-indicator'), round indicators R1-R4 (data-testid='round-indicator-1' to 4), message input, send button, Next Round button, Show IDE button, End Interview button.

interview_voice_ui.details: Voice-related UI elements present: mic button toggles listening state, voice toggle enables/disables TTS, live transcript banner shows when listening (data-testid='live-transcript-banner'). Note: Actual speech recognition requires browser permission.

interview_camera_ui.details: Camera toggle button present (data-testid='toggle-camera-btn'). Camera preview container (data-testid='camera-preview') renders when camera is on. Note: Actual camera stream requires browser permission - console shows 'Camera denied: NotFoundError' in headless browser.

custom_question_visualizer_api.details: POST /api/visualize/question returns visualization data with: data_structure (array/linkedlist/binarytree/stack/graph), title, data array, steps array with step/title/description/active_indices/state/highlight, explanation, complexity (time/space). Tested with Two Sum problem - returned 'Two Sum - Hash Map Approach' with correct steps.

custom_question_visualizer_ui.details: 3D Visualizer page (/visualizer) has custom question input textarea (data-testid='custom-question-input') with Visualize button (data-testid='visualize-question-btn'). After visualization, shows result card (data-testid='custom-viz-result') with title, explanation, complexity, step-by-step navigation, Run Algorithm button.

3d_visualizer_data_structures.details: All 5 data structure options present and working: Array, LinkedList, BinaryTree, Stack, Graph. Three.js canvas renders correctly. Traverse animation button works.

sql_playground_580_problems.details: SQL Lab page shows '580 problems across 14 categories'. Playground/Problems (580)/Schema tabs present. SQL Mentor chatbot available.

problem_workspace_enhanced.details: Problem Workspace (/problems/prob_00001) shows enhanced description with: 3 examples (input/output/explanation), constraints, hints (Show Hints button), time/space complexity, company tags. 4 tabs: Description, Tests, Pattern, Debugger.

problem_workspace_pattern_tab.details: Pattern tab shows: pattern name (Two Pointers), pattern explanation, Key Insight, When to Use scenarios, Similar Problems, Algorithm Steps with visual state representation.

problem_workspace_debugger_tab.details: Debugger tab shows step-by-step navigation with: progress bar (Step 1/6), current step details with state visualization, Prev/Next navigation buttons, All Steps timeline.

test_classes: TestCustomQuestionVisualizer (5 tests) - visualize question returns 200, data_structure, steps, complexity, data array
TestInterviewAPIs (6 tests) - start interview, initial message, get interview, send message, next round, list interviews
TestProctoringAPI (2 tests) - log tab switch event, log face detection event
TestAuthRequired (2 tests) - visualize question requires auth, interviews start requires auth

notes_on_voice_camera_features.voice_features: Web Speech API (SpeechRecognition) requires browser permission. Code implements: auto-listen after AI speaks (utterance.onend triggers startListening), live transcript banner shows real-time text (liveTranscript state), auto-send after 3s silence (silenceTimer in recognition.onresult).
notes_on_voice_camera_features.camera_features: getUserMedia requires browser permission. Code implements: video ref timing fix (setTimeout after setCameraOn), stream attachment in useEffect when cameraOn changes. Camera preview renders as absolute-positioned video element.
notes_on_voice_camera_features.testing_limitation: These features cannot be fully automated tested in headless browser due to permission requirements. UI elements verified present and code logic reviewed.
